trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 62.8 in the ideal bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — cleanest setup on the board with no overbought risk.
Score 95 with RSI 61.4 in sweet spot, strong MACD momentum, and photonics/telecom tailwinds make this a quality growth add despite the high share price.
Score 95 with RSI 69.2 still inside the bullish zone, MACD bullish, and low per-share price allows meaningful position sizing — speculative EV exposure with strong near-term momentum.

decisions.briefing: Markets closed essentially flat today — a neutral session with no meaningful direction. With 5 open slots and $1,173 cash sitting idle, deploying into the three highest-conviction score-95 names (EAT, LITE, NIO) that all show RSI in the ideal 55–70 bullish zone rather than overbought territory. Existing positions in AMZN (score 95, RSI 66.5) confirm the hold thesis; GOOGL, QQQ, MSTR, and AAOI are not on the screener today but show no stop-loss triggers.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities ended virtually flat on April 29 as investors balanced lingering uncertainty around U.S.-China trade tariff negotiations against a generally resilient earnings season. The NASDAQ edged up 0.1% while the S&P 500 was unchanged, reflecting a market in 'wait-and-see' mode ahead of key Fed speakers and upcoming economic data. Sector rotation was mild, with energy and consumer discretionary seeing modest gains while financials and utilities lagged.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市4月29日幾乎收平，投資者在中美關稅談判持續不確定的背景下，與整體穩健的財報季之間尋求平衡。納斯達克小幅上漲0.1%，標普500指數幾乎持平，市場整體進入觀望狀態，靜待聯儲局官員的最新表態及即將公布的經濟數據。板塊輪動溫和，能源及非必需消費品略有上升，金融及公用事業表現相對落後。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock is rising or falling on a scale of 0–100. An RSI between 55 and 70 is the 'bullish sweet spot' — the stock has strong upward momentum but hasn't yet entered overbought territory (above 70), which reduces the risk of a sharp pullback. Today's top buys (EAT, LITE, NIO) were all chosen partly because their RSIs sit in this ideal range.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）以0至100的區間衡量股價上升或下跌的速度。RSI介於55至70之間被視為「牛市甜蜜區」——代表股價具有強勁上升動能，但尚未進入超買區域（70以上），從而降低急跌回調的風險。今日買入的EAT、LITE及NIO均符合此條件，是選股的重要依據之一。
